fix_map.over_length: Enforce <=30 words in explicit short-mode; hard-trim second sentence unless it carries the concrete object.
fix_map.stage_business_present: When short-mode active, ban opening and inline action fences unless motion continuity is user-required.
fix_map.no_concrete_directive: Require imperative verb + concrete object in first clause.
fix_map.abstraction_over_action: Replace value-language with one do-now move plus optional 5-10 minute bound.
fix_map.other: Manual inspect; usually blended failure of directive clarity and stylistic inertia.
